description_long: This is a hand-painted Russian matryoshka-style doll, featuring a rounded, bulbous body and a domed head. The surface is predominantly white with intricate blue floral patterns and decorative motifs, typical of Gzhel ceramics. The front displays a stylized female face with large blue eyes, long eyelashes, pink cheeks, and red lips, framed by a painted section of light brown hair. The blue floral designs wrap around the body, with the densest concentration on the front and lighter, more abstract patterns on the sides and back. The base is slightly flattened and dark blue, providing stability for the doll to stand upright. The object appears to be made of painted ceramic or wood, with a glossy finish that enhances the vibrancy of the blue and white colors.
description: A hand-painted matryoshka-style doll with a white base, blue floral patterns, and a stylized female face with large eyes and pink cheeks. The surface is glossy and features intricate blue designs wrapping around the rounded body.
description_view_0: The front view shows the doll's face with large blue eyes, pink cheeks, red lips, and detailed blue floral patterns concentrated on the chest.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the continuation of the blue floral motifs and a partial view of the face, with more white space and scattered blue dots.
description_view_2: The back view displays mostly white surface with sparse blue floral accents and dots, and a gradient of blue at the base.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the side of the face, blue floral patterns, and a transition from dense to sparse decoration toward the back.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is depicted wearing a traditional Russian folk dress, suggested by the painted blue floral motifs and stylized patterns on a white background, reminiscent of Gzhel ceramic art. The garment features a high neckline and is adorned with intricate blue flowers and leaves.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a static, upright position with no visible limbs; the body is a continuous rounded form with a domed head, typical of matryoshka dolls.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is smiling, with wide blue eyes, long painted eyelashes, arched eyebrows, rosy cheeks, and a small red mouth curved upward.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight, light brown hair painted as a single section across the forehead.
